summary: Iteration 110 Testing Complete - Fixed CRITICAL bug in BeneficiaryHubPage.js where getOrbitLevel and orbitColors were referenced but not defined (dead code removal was incomplete). All orbit visualization features verified working.
passed_tests: Desktop viewport: center node 80x80px, orbit nodes 50x50px
Mobile viewport (390px): center node 60x60px, orbit nodes 42x42px
Orbit nodes are clickable and navigate to /beneficiary/pre
Ring hierarchy mapping: Mother/Father → Ring 0 (inverted - benefactor's children)
Ring hierarchy mapping: Son/Daughter → Ring 1 (benefactor's parents)
Ring hierarchy mapping: Grandmother/Grandfather → Ring 1 (inverted - benefactor's grandchildren)
Ring hierarchy mapping: Grandson/Granddaughter → Ring 2 (benefactor's grandparents)
BeneficiaryHubPage loads after dead code removal fix

bugs_fixed_by_tester.issue: ReferenceError: getOrbitLevel is not defined at line 264
bugs_fixed_by_tester.root_cause: Dead code removal was incomplete - lines 264-265 still referenced getOrbitLevel and orbitColors functions that were removed
bugs_fixed_by_tester.fix: Added import statement: import OrbitVisualization, { getOrbitLevel, orbitColors } from '../../components/estate/OrbitVisualization'
Added export statement: export { getOrbitLevel, orbitColors }

seed_data_creation: Created family_connection record (id: 6688a7d0-5afc-41e6-9251-a2fd7ba93bee) linking admin user to Tester Family Estate with relation 'Friend' for testing orbit visualization
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 110 fully tested. Key fix: BeneficiaryHubPage.js line 264 was using getOrbitLevel and orbitColors which were removed in dead code cleanup but still needed by the Family Members List section. Fixed by exporting from OrbitVisualization.js and importing in BeneficiaryHubPage.js. Orbit visualization is fully responsive - scales down on mobile (390px) with smaller node sizes (42px vs 50px on desktop) and smaller rings. Ring hierarchy follows inverted relationship mapping from benefactor's perspective.
